actionTitle.description: Exact action title from getCodeActions output

packageManager.description: Package manager to use. Defaults to 'auto'.

maxAge.description: Only report packages where versions differ by major (1) or minor (2) increments — reserved for future use.

items.description: List of positions to look up (max 10)
List of positions to look up (max 10)

filePath.description: Path to the file to check

id.description: Decoration set ID to clear. Omit to clear all.

filePath.description: File whose tab to close (absolute or workspace-relative)

includeDiff.description: Include recent git diff (staged + unstaged). Default: true

includeHandoffNote.description: Include the workspace handoff note. Default: true

filePath.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path for new file or directory

isDirectory.description: Create a directory instead of a file (default: false)

overwrite.description: Overwrite if file already exists (default: false)

openAfterCreate.description: Open file in editor after creation (default: true)

cwd.description: Working dir for terminal (must be within workspace)

env.description: Extra env vars (key-value pairs, max 50 entries)

show.description: Show terminal panel after creation (default: true)

filePath.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to delete

useTrash.description: Move to trash instead of permanent delete (default: true)

includePatterns.description: Reserved for future use — accepted but ignored.

available.description: Whether a detector (ts-prune or tsc) was found

total.description: Total unused symbols found before maxResults cap

filePath.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the file

edits.description: Array of edit operations to apply atomically

text.description: Text to insert or replace with

save.description: Save the file after applying edits (default: false)

frameId.description: Stack frame ID from getDebugState callStack (0=top frame)

command.description: VS Code command ID to execute

args.description: Arguments to pass to the command

includeCodeActions.description: Also fetch available code actions at this position (default: false)

includeSiblings.description: Also fetch sibling symbols in the same file — other functions, classes, and variables defined alongside the target (default: false)

useMemoryGraph.description: Query codebase-memory graph for architectural context: module ownership, ADRs, graph callers (default: false). Requires codebase-memory MCP connected + repo indexed.

directory.description: Subdirectory to search in (relative to workspace)

cursor.description: Cursor from previous call's nextCursor. Omit on first call.

filePath.description: File to fix (relative or absolute path)
Path to the file (absolute or workspace-relative)
File to format (relative or absolute path)

outputFile.description: Suggested output path for the test file

exports.description: Exported names extracted from the source file

content.description: Generated test scaffold ready to write to outputFile

showStats.description: Include per-tool stats (call count, avg duration, error count). Default: false

showPercentiles.description: Include per-tool p50/p95/p99 duration percentiles (requires showStats). Default: false

showCoOccurrence.description: Include tool-pair co-occurrence within the time window. Default: false

coOccurrenceWindowMs.description: Sliding window for co-occurrence in ms (default: 300000 = 5 min, max: 3600000)

stats.description: Per-tool stats: count, avgDurationMs, errors, and optional percentiles

percentiles.description: Per-tool p50/p95/p99 duration in ms with sample count (only when showStats+showPercentiles)

coOccurrence.description: Tool pairs called within coOccurrenceWindowMs of each other, sorted by count desc

maxNodes.description: Max graph nodes to return per aspect (default: 20)

endLine.description: Last line to include (1-based, default: all lines)

content.description: File or buffer content (may be sliced by startLine/endLine)

isDirty.description: True when the buffer has unsaved changes (extension only)

source.description: Whether content came from the live VS Code buffer or disk

cursor.description: Cursor from previous call's nextCursor. Omit on first call.

filePath.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path of the edited file

changedSymbols.description: Symbols that were changed (optional). Each entry must have a name; optionally a line number to disambiguate overloads.

workspaceOnly.description: Filter references to workspace files only (default: true). External refs (node_modules, stdlib) are counted separately.

file.description: Coverage report path. Omit to auto-detect in coverage/

minCoverage.description: Filter: only return files below this coverage %

includePatch.description: Include full diff patch. Default: true. Set false for metadata/stats only.

filePath.description: Limit diff to a single file (absolute or workspace-relative)

packageManager.description: Package manager to use. Default: auto-detect from manifest files

uri.description: File filter: absolute path, workspace-relative path, or file:// URI. Returns diagnostics for that file only.

severity.description: Min severity to return. Order: error > warning > information > hint. Use 'error' for build-breaking only.

ref1.description: Base ref (branch, tag, or commit hash)

ref2.description: Comparison ref (branch, tag, or commit hash)

filePath.description: Limit diff to a single file (absolute or workspace-relative)

context.description: Number of context lines around changes. Default: 3

statOnly.description: Return file-level stat summary only (no patch). Default: false.

filePath.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the file

directory.description: Subdirectory to list (relative to workspace, default: root)

filePath.description: Filter diff to a single file (absolute or workspace-relative)

context.description: Number of context lines around changes. Default: 3

truncated.description: True when diff was capped at the size limit

path.description: Subdirectory or glob to scope analysis (e.g. 'src/'). Default: entire repo

since.description: ISO date string — start of the lookback window

totalCommitsScanned.description: Total commits in the time window

commits.description: Number of commits touching this file

scopedTo.description: Present when analysis was scoped to a subdirectory

maxEntries.description: Max log entries to return (default: 20, max: 100)

filePath.description: Filter log to a single file (absolute or workspace-relative)
Filter status to a single file (absolute or workspace-relative)

project.description: Single project object or array when multiple detected

style.description: bullet (default), prose (paragraph), or conventional (grouped by commit type)

packageManager.description: Package manager to audit. Default: auto-detect

severity.description: Minimum severity to include in results. Default: all

onlyFixable.description: Only return advisories that have a known fix available

endLine.description: Last line to include (1-based, inclusive, optional)

name.description: Terminal name to retrieve output from

section.description: Settings section to read (e.g. 'editor', 'typescript'). Omit for all.

files.description: Paths to stage (absolute or workspace-relative). Omit to stage all modified tracked files.

addUntracked.description: Also stage new untracked files. Default: false.

filePath.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the file

startLine.description: First line number to blame (1-based, inclusive). Omit for start of file.

endLine.description: Last line number to blame (1-based, inclusive). Omit for end of file.

branch.description: Branch name to switch to or create

create.description: Create branch if it doesn't exist. Default: false.

base.description: Base branch or commit to create from (only when create: true). Defaults to HEAD.

files.description: Files to stage before committing. Omit to commit already-staged changes.

addAll.description: Stage all tracked changes before committing (git add -u). Default: false.

all.description: Fetch from all configured remotes. Default: false.

includeRemote.description: Include remote-tracking branches (e.g. origin/main). Default: false.

branch.description: Remote branch to pull from (default: tracking branch for current branch)

rebase.description: Rebase local commits on top of remote changes instead of merging. Default: false.

setUpstream.description: Set the upstream tracking branch (-u). Use on first push of a new branch. Default: false.

force.description: Force push with --force-with-lease. Blocked on main/master. Default: false.

message.description: Optional description for the stash entry

includeUntracked.description: Also stash untracked (new) files. Default: false.

index.description: Stash entry index to pop (0 = most recent). Default: 0.

filter.description: Optional substring filter on command IDs

newFileContents.description: Contents for the new file version

filePath.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the file to open

startLine.description: Line number to scroll to (1-based). If both startLine and startText are provided, startLine takes precedence.

startText.description: Text pattern to find and scroll to. If both startLine and startText are provided, startLine takes precedence.

filename.description: Basename only, must end in .html. Default: report-<timestamp>.html

filePath.description: File to organize imports in (relative or absolute path)
Path to the .http or .rest file within the workspace

actionTitle.description: Exact action title from getCodeActions output
Exact action title from getCodeActions output

overwrite.description: Overwrite if target already exists (default: false)

oldContent.description: The exact text to find and replace (must match precisely, including whitespace)

newContent.description: The text to replace oldContent with

command.description: Command basename (must be in allowlist, no paths)

cwd.description: Working dir (absolute or workspace-relative, default: workspace root)

command.description: Shell command to run (no metacharacters or newlines)

name.description: Terminal name (from listTerminals). Uses active if omitted.

index.description: Terminal index (0-based) from listTerminals. Used if name omitted.

timeout.description: Seconds to wait for completion (default: 30, max: 300)

show.description: Focus terminal panel while running (default: true)

filter.description: Test name pattern or file path to filter tests

runner.description: Runner to use (vitest/jest/pytest/cargo-test/go-test). Default: all detected

noCache.description: Skip cache and force a fresh run. Default: false

timeoutMs.description: Subprocess timeout in ms. Default: 120000 (2 min). Increase for large suites.

available.description: Whether any test runners were detected

runners.description: Names of runners that were executed

failures.description: Subset of results where status is failed or errored

error.description: Set when a specific runner was requested but not found

name.description: Name of the task to run

type.description: Task type filter (e.g. 'shell', 'npm') to disambiguate tasks with the same name

timeout.description: Seconds to wait for task completion (default: 60, max: 300)

filePath.description: Path to the file to save

pattern.description: Text or regex pattern to search for

replacement.description: Replacement text. For regex mode, supports $1, $2, etc. capture group references.

glob.description: File glob pattern to limit scope (e.g. '**/*.ts', 'src/**/*.py'). Omit to search all text files.

isRegex.description: Treat pattern as a JavaScript regex. Default: false (literal string match).

dryRun.description: If true, returns what would change without writing any files. Useful for previewing impact. Default: false.

includeIgnored.description: Search inside .gitignored files (e.g. node_modules, build output). Default: false.

contextLines.description: Lines of context around matches (default: 0, max: 5)

headers.description: Optional request headers as key/value pairs

body.description: Request body. JSON: pass serialized string + Content-Type: application/json. Ignored for GET/HEAD.

maxResponseBytes.description: Maximum bytes to read from response body. Default: 51200, max: 1048576.

followRedirects.description: Follow HTTP redirects (max 10 hops, default: true)

text.description: Text or command to send to the terminal

addNewline.description: Append newline to execute as command (default: true)

isCommand.description: False for short stdin responses to interactive prompts (max 512 chars, no shell metacharacters). Default: true.

path.description: Absolute path to the workspace folder to activate

breakpoints.description: Breakpoints to set (replaces existing ones for this file)

file.description: Absolute path to the file to decorate

message.description: Inline message shown after the line

note.description: Free-text context summary. Keep it concise — one to a few sentences describing what you were working on, key findings, and the next step.

target.description: Which scope to write to (default: workspace)

line.description: Line number (1-based, inside a function call)

configName.description: Name of the launch configuration to use

id.description: ID of the watcher to remove

markComplete.description: Task texts to mark as complete (substring match)

markIncomplete.description: Task texts to mark as incomplete (substring match)

addTasks.description: Tasks to add to a section

section.description: Section name to add tasks to

pattern.description: JS regex to match against terminal output lines

name.description: Terminal name (from listTerminals). Uses active if omitted.

index.description: Terminal index (0-based) from listTerminals. Used if name omitted.

sinceId.description: Return entries with id > sinceId. Omit on first call.

timeoutMs.description: Max wait in milliseconds (default: 2000, min: 1000, max: 30000)

filePath.description: Optional: only watch diagnostics for this specific file

timeoutMs.description: Max wait time in milliseconds (default: 10000, max: 30000)

sinceTimestamp.description: Only return if diagnostics changed after this timestamp (from a previous watchDiagnostics call)

outputSchema.description: Diagnostic entries from extension path include firstSeenAt, recurrenceCount, and optional introducedByCommit fields.

id.description: Unique ID for this watcher (used to unwatch later)
